abstract: People are relying on AI agents to assist them with various tasks. The human must know when to rely on the agent, collaborate with the agent, or ignore its suggestions. In this work, we propose to learn rules, grounded in data regions and described in natural language, that illustrate how the human should collaborate with the AI. Our novel region discovery algorithm finds local regions in the data as neighborhoods in an embedding space where prior human behavior should be corrected. Each region is then described using a large language model in an iterative and contrastive procedure. We then teach these rules to the human via an onboarding stage. Through user studies on object detection and question-answering tasks, we show that our method can lead to more accurate human-AI teams. We also evaluate our region discovery and description algorithms separately.

ob.ai_reason: 人-AI团队学习规则，AI代理协作，高度相关OB/管理
ob.tldr: 利用区域发现算法在嵌入空间定位需纠正的行为邻域，借助大语言模型生成自然语言规则，再通过入职培训向用户传递。用户在目标检测和问答任务中表现更佳，证明该规则学习与培训框架可提升人机团队效能。

title: Effective Human-AI Teams via Learned Natural Language Rules and Onboarding
title_zh: 通过学习的自然语言规则和入职培训实现高效的人机团队
